assertions.text: Explains .combine merges children labels with pauses between them
assertions.rationale: Skill documents the comma-separated reading behavior of .combine

assertions.text: Explains .ignore hides children and requires a custom label on parent
assertions.rationale: Skill emphasizes .ignore needs manual label or content is lost

assertions.text: Recommends .ignore + custom label when natural sentence reading is needed
assertions.rationale: Skill's decision tree: .combine for joined labels, .ignore for natural sentences
